description.value: Price 20 gp ABOUT The use of this mild, dizzying powder has spread throughout much of the world. Once taken, this sparkling, honeydew-colored inhalant gives the user a euphoric sensation that can quickly become overwhelming and even sickening. While the long-term effects are relatively minor, few except the hardy care to risk stomaching this toxin. DETAILS Type inhaled; Addiction minor , Fortitude DC 13 EFFECT 1 hour; +1d2 alchemical bonus to Charisma , â2 penalty on saves against illusions EFFECT After 1 hour; 75% chance to become sickened for 1d4 hours DAMAGE 1d2 Wis damage
